mapper.sql: attachment_id, homework_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, upload_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_homework_attachment(homework_id, file_name, file_url, file_size, upload_time, del_flag) values (#{homeworkId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_homework_attachment
homework_id,
file_name,
file_url,
file_size,
upload_time,
del_flag,

#{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update biz_homework_attachment
homework_id = #{homeworkId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT},
upload_time = #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where attachment_id = #{attachmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_homework_attachment set homework_id = #{homeworkId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, upload_time = #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where attachment_id = #{attachmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
